name: Chi-Chi or Chichi (Alcoholic Mixed Drink)
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth in blender.
Garnish with a slice of pineapple and a cherry.

similar.name: " Red Robin" Drink Recipe: Mai Tai

name: " Red Robin" Drink Recipe: Mai Tai
directions: Add grenadine and orgeat into a bottom of glass.
Mound ice into glass.
Add white rum and orange curaco.
Add OJ, sweet and sour, and pineapple juices.
"Float" Bacardi dark rum and Myers dark rum on top.
**Should go in a glass aprox 13- 15 ounces***.

name: Pink Mai Tai
directions: Combine all ingredients in order starting with the light rum on down in a highball glass over shaved ice.
Stir.
Pour dark rum over top.
Garnish with a pineapple wedge and cherry or edible flower.

similar.name: " Red Robin" Drink Recipe: Mai Tai

name: Hawaiian Sunset Cocktail
directions: Place ice cubes into the glass.
Shake vodka, orange juice and cranberry juice in a shaker.
Pour into glass.
Top off with soda water.
Garnish with cherry and pineapple slice (optional).
Serve in a highball glass.

name: Hawaiian Coffee
directions: Brew the coffee and water.
Lightly brown the grated coconut in a saucepan.
Pour the hot coffee and coconut milk into a glass.
Sweeten as/if desired.
Stir.
Top with the toasted grated coconut and serve.

name: Volcano Cocktail
directions: Shake ingredients (except 151 rum) with ice, then strain into volcano bowl or cocktail glasses.
Pour 151 rum into volcano crater if using volcano bowl, and ignite just prior to serving.

similar.name: " Red Robin" Drink Recipe: Mai Tai

name: Hawaiian Hammer
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker with ice. Pour in all the ingredients, and shake them until cold. Pour or strain the mixture (depending whether or not you want ice in your drink) into a highball glass.
Garnish with a pineapple wedge, orange slice, and/or cherry.

similar.name: " Red Robin" Drink Recipe: Mai Tai
